feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Issue in updating inspection lot characteristics after UD Made
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement to update inspection lot characteristics using ABAP logic after Usage Decision has made.

I have tried with the BAPI(BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS) for the Result recording this BAPI is throwing the below error

Can anyone please help me with the process to achieve this scenario.

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: EWM RF Terminal Development: How to Display Barcode Data?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working on a project in the #SAP EWM module where I need to develop a small RF terminal (handheld device) application. The goal is to scan a barcode, use it to retrieve some fields from an EWM table (for example, one of the /SCWM/ tables), and display this information on the RF terminal screen. However, I'm not entirely sure how to approach this task from scratch.

If you could recommend any books, documents, or video tutorials that explain how to perform this step-by-step, I would be very grateful. I am especially looking for resources that cover RF development within SAP EWM.

Any book recommendations, links to # SAP Learning Hub, or YouTube video series would be incredibly helpful. Thank you very much in advance for your assistance

Note: I am an ABAP developer and fairly new to SAP EWM, so materials that start with the basics would be more helpful.

entry.title: Edit IN MM01/MM01 FIELD MBEW-BKLAS
entry.content:
Hello !!

Could you help me? Please !!!

I need a exit/badi.. or customizing.. after the mara-matkl field is filled in the basic data tab 1, change the mbew-bklas field in the accounting tab 1

Input -> MARA-MATKL 

UPDATE/EDIT ->  MBEW-BKLAS. 

Thx !!

entry.title: Analytical CDS Views - union associations is different in selections (3)
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 we have a business requirement to merge Profit center analysis standard view with Journal Entry Analyser Standard view . 
When I am merging, I used union all in the cube view for the requirement . I am now getting syntax error saying association is different between selections. I checked multiple times , got checked with my team as well, the sequence of fields is same. No common associations between 2 Union all selects . Still the error doesn’t go away.

please find below screenshot and help me out. I don’t find much blogs on this topic.

entry.title: Search help restrictions fields are disabled for input.
entry.content:
Hi All,

When creating a very simple search my restrictions fields are disable for input.

This is the search (SE11):

And this is how the restriction columns appear when calling the help as a matchcode (or when testing it in SE11)

Any ideas?

TIA,

Luis

entry.title: How to Change the Rounding Residual Threshold (0.0005) for Quantity Field
entry.content:
Currently it already round up from 0.0005 to 0.0009 = 0.001. We want all amount with more than 4 decimal point issues also round up to 0.001. This affects rounding residuals and cause inconsistencies. Once this is solved user will not see error message "Qty must be larger than 0" struck in MES/COGI. 

Current Logic Example     

0.0005 = 0.001

0.0004 = 0 (SAP Converts to zero)

We need Logic   

0.0005 = 0.001

0.0004 = 0.001 (Do not convert to zero)

Should i create custom function?

Note that we cannot implement OSS and Define Rounding Profiles in SPRO because it will affect all MM and PP modules. We only need to implement on one field and one interface.

entry.title: how to deal with extension of BAPI BAPI_RESERVATION_CHANGE
entry.content: hey guys, i still can't find the exit enhancement for the bapi 'BAPI_RESERVATION_CHANGE', who can give me some suggestions to deal with the extension for updating the Z_field in RESB table .

entry.title: ME21N CHECK ON WARNING RED-LIGHTS NEEDS TO STOP THE PORCESS OF CREATING PO ORDER
entry.content:
Hey folks,

We are trying to solve an issue during the creation of a Purchase Order (PO).
As per the standard, when we add materials to the line items, the system provides traffic light indicators.

The only available BAdI (ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST) does not stop the program when attempting to check these indicators.

The goal is that if the traffic lights are "red," meaning error messages, the program should NOT save the document.

i'll show below step by step.
1) We add one material 

2) press "Save"

3) then my BADI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST is activated.
and it's shows the message that it should stop the TCode of PO.

4) Pressing "F8" an it's appear the pop-up that we can chose if we can proceed further with the PO.

5) the issue is that we should not proceed with the "hold" button because we have the red-lights "red", but my check on step 3 is not stopping the Parking of the PO.

you folks have any ideas how to break the creation of the PO?

thanks in advance for your collab,

G. & E.

entry.title: Equivalent ABAP 7.4 code for the below code (loop and read)
entry.content:
Hello experts...

Can someone pls write the ABAP 7.4 code for the below ABAP statements?
From all the forums, I do not understand the use of LET and FOR and other statements.

This is the code I have:

LOOP AT t_accit INTO DATA(wa_accit) WHERE old_doc_number IS NOT INITIAL.
    DATA(doc_num) = wa_accit-old_doc_number.
    EXIT.
    ENDLOOP.
    CLEAR wa_accit.
READ TABLE t_vbrp INTO DATA(wa_vbrp) WITH KEY vbeln = doc_num.
if sy-subrc = 0.   
  lv_tdname = wa_vbrp-aubel.   
  endif.
CLEAR wa_vbrp.

Thanks, in advance

entry.title: Error "Message target paths are not supported for higher expand levels"
entry.content:
Hello community! I come to ask you for help with this error that I'm receiving when making a POST request to a service created with RAP where I have a child entity created as a composition that allows the loading of a document. In the implementation of the behavior I only have added the adjust number method for late numbering, nothing additional. I don't understand what the error is and how I can fix it.

The error occurs after the record has been correctly created in db.

entry.title: Invalid char # replacement
entry.content:
I am retrieving some binary data from a table, decompressing and then converting to string with code page 0160, but I have issues with accented characters as it does not get recognized. Have tried multiple codepages (present in TCP00) but without any luck. 


Is there any workaround for this?

 

TRY.
    cl_abap_gzip=>decompress_binary(
      EXPORTING
        gzip_in     = lv_xstring
        gzip_in_len = -1
      IMPORTING
        raw_out     = lv_xstring
    ).

  CATCH cx_parameter_invalid_range.
  CATCH cx_sy_buffer_overflow.
  CATCH cx_sy_compression_error.
ENDTRY.

DATA(rv_data) = cl_bcs_convert=>xstring_to_string(
  iv_xstr = lv_xstring
  iv_cp   = '0120' ).

entry.title: BADI to update partner profit center while creating journal Entries
entry.content:
I have a requirement in SAP Public cloud where while creating journal entry via creating incoming invoice, the input Partner Profit center should get copied form line item 002 to line item 001.

The BADI FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION does not work because line item 001 gets created before 002.

Please help me with the same

entry.title: Call a CDS view from another CDS view passing parameter from result
entry.content:
Hi!

I have a hiearchy-cds (CDS1) where the "Start with" value is a parameter. P_OrgUnit.

Now I need to call the CDS1 from another cds view (CDS2) passing the parameter with a result.

CDS2 gives a org unit and CDS1 is supposed to get the structure based on the result of CDS2.

CDS2.HomeOrgUnit --> CDS1 P_OrgUnit.

Is this possible? In any way to solve this?

entry.title: $batch process to delete single or multiple Vendor from BusinessPartner number
entry.content:
Hey.

Here I try to delete a Vendor from BusinessPartner number - '101127'. I am using the $batch process to delete the Vendor but don't know it throw error as - Batch request payload is invalid.

Please help me to resolve this. here I attach a screenshot for the reference.

Please tell me the step by step process that what changes I have to make to correct this.
Thanks in advance.


OData  SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: Can we add both Data structure and table to Sq01 Query?
entry.content:
I would like to add one structure and one table to the same query using Sq01.

These structure doesn`t have any table. So what should I do? Should I create the tables first and then add the queries or is there any other way?

entry.title: SOIN -EXCEL data Binary conversion issue - S050 method - PROCESS_INBOUND - cont_hex[]
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am working on requirement , Need to post some data in SAP based on inbound email excel attachment data

Excel data is coming as hex decimal format inside the method PROCESS_INBOUND of interface IF_INBOUND_EXIT_BCS, while converting that data into text/string format , data getting converted as junk values.

I am trying to covert the data using standard class cl_bcs_convert methods , FM Starts with SCMS* 

but nothing working out.

Could you please provide help me how i can achieve this .

 

 

Reagrds,

Purna

entry.title: Abap how to display internal table content in the right container as a HTML page.
entry.content:
Hi gurus.  it is important and urgent please.   

I am using cl_gui_container class, splitted into two ,

one is container_left which displays the tree...

second one is container_right which has to display HTML page.

When user clicks on left hand side tree in the left container.., corresponding internal table(fetched from DB table) has to be displayed in the right container as a html page.  I am using cl_abap_brower=> show_html.  however, i could not print itab content.  Thank you for your help in advance.

It would be also great, if you also can suggest how to print the itab content, with sub-heading with blue color bold font.

entry.title: Write an ABAP formula for a mass change
entry.content:
Hi 
I am struggling with the mass change pop-ups that allows to create formulas and ABAP formulas.
I am using transaction IP17 (change maintenance items), menu option "Goto" / "Carry out a mass change". I pick a field which contains free text (maintenance item text), and I want to create a formula to manipulate the content of this text field (i.e. remplace a part of the text, for example update "3MO Int Maint" into "1MO Int Maint") for many items.
I understand this is not the purpose of the "replace only" flag which is a filtering function for the selection and not a text content manipulation function, but it seems possible to use a formula, and write your own ABAP formula, which opens a pop-up to write ABAP code with the following template:

* X is the value you must return
form GET_NEW_MPLAN_MPOS_MASS_PSTXT
using segment structure MPLAN_MPOS_MASS
changing X.

endform.

I have tried many things but when I put a value in the X variable (as basic as X = 'TEST'), the formula check says it has no error, but then the mass change fails. Error message is: "Error@ Maintenance Item 63970 : Obligatory parameter PSTXT of maintenance item is not filled ( API Message MPLAN 214 )". Which I do not understand as PSTXT is the field I have selected for mass change (maintenance item text).

Screenshots of every step attached.

What I am doing wrong here?
Thanks in advance for nay idea.

entry.title: can I use CORRESPONDING # for deep internal tables?
entry.content:
as of now I am doing the value assignment using FOR LOOP as shown below, I was curious the same can be done using MAPPING keyword?

Source and Target structure are not identical. Source is a simple internal table and target is a deep internal table.

 

et_ds_rel_map_upd = VALUE #( FOR <fs_ds_rel_map> IN lt_ds_relmap_upd_U
                             ( %key-ds     = <fs_ds_rel_map>-ds_id
                               %key-dsfld  = <fs_ds_rel_map>-ds_fld
                               %key-rcon   = 'M'
                               sourceds    = <fs_ds_rel_map>-for_ds_id
                               sourcedsfld = <fs_ds_rel_map>-for_ds_fld
                          %control = VALUE #( sourceds = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                           sourcedsfld = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                          sourcedsexpr = if_abap_behv=>mk-on )
                             ) ).

 



Thanks in advance.

entry.title: BADI IDOC_DATA_INSERT for populating Z fields in VBAK table - My expiriance
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

This short post should give a little help to developers which are tasked to fill custom Z fields in appended structure of VBAK table by processing inbound IDOC via FM IDOC_INPUT_COD_SALESORDER_CREA. My task was fairly simple: Write dates from inbound IDOC segment E1BPSDHD1 fields CT_VALID_F and CT_VALID_T into the custom Z fields of table VBAK, ZZPOCETAK and ZZKRAJ. This is step by step my suggestion to complete that task.

Step 1.  Append structures with these fields to structures: 

  • BAPE_VBAK – fields

     

  • BAPE_VBAKX - flags

     

  • VBAKKOZ

 

  • VBAKKOZX

  •  

Step 2. SE18 - Implement BADI IDOC_DATA_INSERT, create a class with suggested name ZCL_IM_IDOC_DATA_INSERT with method from interface IF_EX_IDOC_DATA_INSERT~FILL.

Step 3. Fun part 🙂 Insert two segments E1BPPAREX, with information that needs to be saved in Z fields. Pay special respect to the actual place of your information in IDOC document. In my case I found that segment offset E1BPSDHD1 is not the same as in specification in WE60. Also find exact position of flags and fields for structures BAPE_VBAK and BAPE_VBAKX in E1BPPAREX segment. This segment should fill extensionin table in FM IDOC_INPUT_COD_SALESORDER_CREA. Do not increment segment number, segment number should be max number in your IDOC DATA table.

  method if_ex_idoc_data_insert~fill.

*------------------------------------------------------------
* Purpose: Add custom segments to the IDoc data based on existing segments.
* Author: [Miljan Djuric]
* Date: [20241118]
* Following code is only for creating new documents. If you want to update existing, you will need VBELN field
*------------------------------------------------------------

data: ls_new_entry       type idoc_insert,
      ls_idoc_data       type edid4,
      lv_max_segnum      type edi_segnum,
      lv_parent_segnum   type edi_segnum,
      lv_hlevel          type edi_hlevel,
      lv_valid_from      type char08,
      lv_valid_to        type char08,
      lv_bape_vbak       type char60,
      lt_new_entries     type tab_idocins,
      lv_have_to_change  type c length 1.

  field-symbols: <fs_idoc_data> type edid4.

*------------------------------------------------------------
* Find the highest segment number in the existing IDoc data
*------------------------------------------------------------
  lv_max_segnum = '000000'.

  loop at data assigning <fs_idoc_data>.
    if <fs_idoc_data>-segnum > lv_max_segnum.
      lv_max_segnum = <fs_idoc_data>-segnum.
    endif.
  endloop.

*------------------------------------------------------------
* Read the parent segment 'E1BPSDHD1' to get its 'SEGNUM' and 'HLEVEL'
*------------------------------------------------------------
  read table data into ls_idoc_data with key segnam = 'E1BPSDHD1'.

  if sy-subrc = 0.

*------------------------------------------------------------
* Extract 'Valid From' and 'Valid To' dates from positions in 'SDATA'
*------------------------------------------------------------
    lv_valid_from = ls_idoc_data-sdata+286(8).  " Start position 286, length 8
    lv_valid_to   = ls_idoc_data-sdata+294(8).  " End   position 294, length 8

*------------------------------------------------------------
* Prepare the first new segment 'E1BPPAREX'
*------------------------------------------------------------
    lv_bape_vbak = |{ 'BAPE_VBAK' width = 60 }|.  " Pad 'BAPE_VBAK' to 60 characters

    concatenate lv_bape_vbak lv_valid_from lv_valid_to into ls_new_entry-sdata respecting blanks.

  " Segment number for the new segment is max number in data table
    ls_new_entry-segnum  = lv_max_segnum.
    ls_new_entry-segnam  = 'E1BPPAREX'.
    ls_new_entry-counter = '000'.

  " Append the new segment to 'lt_new_entries'
    append ls_new_entry to lt_new_entries.

    clear ls_new_entry.

*------------------------------------------------------------
* Prepare the second new segment 'E1BPPAREX'
* Flag structure is 30 in lenght and then you add number of filds with no blanks
* In this case 30 + 10 + 3 and then two XX for flags struc. BAPE_VBAKX
*------------------------------------------------------------
    ls_new_entry-sdata = 'BAPE_VBAKX                                 XX'.

  " Same segment number for the second new segment
    ls_new_entry-segnum  = lv_max_segnum.
    ls_new_entry-segnam  = 'E1BPPAREX'.
    ls_new_entry-counter = '000'.

  " Append the second new segment to 'lt_new_entries'
    append ls_new_entry to lt_new_entries.

*------------------------------------------------------------
* Update protocol data
*------------------------------------------------------------
    protocol-stamid = 'ABVC'.
    protocol-stamno = '123'.
    protocol-repid  = sy-repid.

* Indicate that changes have been made
    have_to_change = 'X'.

*------------------------------------------------------------
* Insert new entries after the parent segment in the IDoc data
*------------------------------------------------------------
    if sy-subrc = 0.
* If parent segment not found, append to the end
      append lines of lt_new_entries to new_entries.
    endif.

  else.
* Parent segment 'E1BPSDHD1' not found, handle accordingly
  " [Optional] Log an error or take alternative action
  endif.

  endmethod.

 I hope this will save some time 🙂
